title: Assistant Store Manager - Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited:
Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited!
